top_experiments.required_runtime: PR95 hnerv_muon runtime plus downloaded 0.bin archive, canonical contest_auth_eval CUDA path
top_experiments.gate: strict ZIP/source provenance, runtime tree SHA, Level-2 claim, exact CUDA JSON with 600 samples
top_experiments.risk: external CPU-workflow claim, whole-stack replacement, possible CUDA/CPU drift or dependency issue
top_experiments.stop_condition: any inflate/eval failure, non-600 sample count, source-side payload issue, or exact score not below 0.25369011029397787

top_experiments.required_runtime: STBM replay runtime with RMB1 randmulti decode
top_experiments.gate: pre-submission compliance already passed locally; next gate is Level-2 claim plus exact CUDA auth eval
top_experiments.risk: low-rate recode risk; any decoded randmulti/runtime mismatch can move components
top_experiments.stop_condition: component deltas differ from STBM anchor or exact score is not lower

top_experiments.required_runtime: PR91/PR86 HPAC HPM1 decoder, native hpac-codec parity, STBM-family archive runtime
top_experiments.gate: full HPM1 submitted-token decode, byte-exact reencode or reviewed source-contract proof, runtime parity, then Level-2 claim and exact CUDA
top_experiments.risk: current local replay fails before score at a concrete entropy-model mismatch
top_experiments.stop_condition: frame-0/full-stream HPM1 cannot decode under pinned contract, prefix bytes miss break-even, or decoded mask parity fails

top_experiments.required_runtime: narrow PR85-family QFQ4/QH0 model loader with output parity preflight
top_experiments.gate: bit-exact tensor parity, deterministic byte-positive archive, runtime output parity, Level-2 claim, exact CUDA
top_experiments.risk: current tensor parity fails for at least one FILM projection; numeric closeness is not enough
top_experiments.stop_condition: no bit-exact model tensor parity or model segment is not byte-positive

top_experiments.expected_score_if_break_even_clears: must beat +0.00012518148318696823 rate cost before dispatch
top_experiments.required_runtime: local RSB1/RMB1 action decoder and PR85/STBM action mapping, no scorer load until a byte-closed candidate exists
top_experiments.gate: non-noop action mapping, exact source/candidate SHA custody, component-response evidence, Level-2 claim, exact CUDA
top_experiments.risk: raw PR92 is rate-negative vs STBM and PR85 QRGB singleton exact evals are negative
top_experiments.stop_condition: no component-benefit path above the +188-byte break-even or any action is not consumed by inflate

aggressive_theoretical_stack_band.absolute_public_replacement_band: 0.195-0.199 if PR95 verifies and admits small entropy/payload refinements
aggressive_theoretical_stack_band.pr85_family_band: 0.248-0.249 if HPM1 contract, RMB1, and QFQ4-style model recode all pass
